Get in touch

Have a question about a product? A topic you'd like to see covered? An issue with a purchase? We'd love to hear from you.

What can we help with?

  • Questions about a digital product purchase
  • Technical issues with downloads
  • Suggestions for future organization guides
  • Affiliate partnership or collaboration inquiries
  • General questions about the content on this site

Digital product issues: If you purchased the Small Space Reset Kit and are having trouble with your download, please include your order email in your message and we'll get it sorted quickly.

Send us a message

Use the form below for questions about downloads, digital products, content suggestions, or partnership inquiries.

We typically reply within 1–2 business days.

Organize with Mary

Renter-friendly organization for calm, clutter-free small spaces.
